lines.english: Whatever the Creator does, surely comes to pass.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, egotism is consumed.
The Naam abides within my mind, and I praise the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਨਾਮੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee kisai de vaddiaaee naamo naam dhiaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, some are blessed with glorious greatness; they meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur seve jevadd hor laahaa naahee |
lines.english: There is no other profit as great as service to the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਮੋ ਲਾਹਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naamo naam sadaa sukhadaataa naamo laahaa paaeidaa |6|
lines.english: The Naam is forever the Giver of peace. Through the Naam, we earn the profit. ||6||
Without the Name, all the world suffers in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naam na seveh kiau sukh paaeeai bin naavai dukh paaeidaa |7|
lines.english: Without serving the Naam, how can anyone find peace? Without the Naam, one suffers in pain. ||7||
The more actions one does, the more the corruption increases.
By Guru's Grace, He reveals Himself to a few.
He Himself acts, and inspires all to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਸੇ ਬੰਧਨ ਤੋੜਹਿ ਮੁਕਤੀ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: guramukh hoveh se bandhan torreh mukatee kai ghar paaeidaa |8|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh breaks his bonds, and attains the home of liberation. ||8||
One who calculates his accounts, burns in the world.
His skepticism and corruption are never dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਗਣਤ ਚੁਕਾਏ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su ganat chukaae sache sach samaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh abandons his calculations; through Truth, we merge in the True Lord. ||9||
By Guru's Grace, it is revealed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਚੁ ਦੇਇ ਤ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: je sach dee ta paae koee |
lines.english: If God grants Truth, then we may attain it.
The Beloved Naam, the Name of the Lord, is chanting, meditation, penance and self-control.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: sach naam saalaahe rang raataa gur kirapaa te sukh paaeidaa |10|
lines.english: One who praises the True Name, and remains imbued with the Lord's Love, by Guru's Grace, finds peace. ||10||
God, the Destroyer, destroys sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਹਜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: har kai naam tan man seetal hoaa sahaje sehaj samaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Through the Name of the Lord, the body and mind are cooled and soothed, and one is intuitively, easily absorbed into the Celestial Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭੁ ਮਨਿ ਮੈਲੈ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: antar lobh man mailai mal laae |
lines.english: With greed within them, their minds are filthy, and they spread filth around.
They do filthy deeds, and suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜੋ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਰੇ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਬੋਲਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: koorro koorr kare vaapaaraa koorr bol dukh paaeidaa |12|
lines.english: They deal in falsehood, and nothing but falsehood; telling lies, they suffer in pain. ||12||
Rare is that person who enshrines the Immaculate Bani of the Guru's Word within his mind.
By Guru's Grace, his skepticism is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੇਤਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: gur kai bhaanai chalai din raatee naam chet sukh paaeidaa |13|
lines.english: He walks in harmony with the Guru's Will, day and night; remembering the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he finds peace. ||13||
He Himself creates and destroys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su sadaa salaahe mil saache sukh paaeidaa |14|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, praises the Lord forever. Meeting the True Lord, he finds peace. ||14||
The True Lord Himself is the Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨੇਕ ਜਤਨ ਕਰੇ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: anek jatan kare indree vas na hoee |
lines.english: Making countless efforts, sexual desire is not overcome.
Everyone is burning in the fires of sexuality and anger.
You Yourself created the sense of 'mine' and 'yours.'

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਮਨੁ ਵਸਿ ਆਵੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਰੇ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: satigur seve man vas aavai man maare maneh samaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, one brings his mind under control; conquering his mind, he merges in the Mind of God. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਜੰਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tere jant tere sabh jeea |
lines.english: All creatures are Yours; You created all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਸਦਾ ਤੂ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੪॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam samaal sadaa too guramatee man vasaaeidaa |16|4|18|
lines.english: O Nanak, contemplate the Naam forever; through the Guru's Teachings, the Lord abides in the mind. ||16||4||18||
The Dear Lord is the Giver, inaccessible and unfathomable.
He does not have even an iota of greed; He is self-sufficient.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਨੋ ਅਪੜਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਕੋਈ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis no aparr na sakai koee aape mel milaaeidaa |1|
lines.english: No one can reach up to Him; He Himself unites in His Union. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin daataa avar na koee |
lines.english: There is no other Giver, except for Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਨਿਹਚਉ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karai su nihchau hoee |
lines.english: Whatever He does, surely comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਾਮ ਦਾਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮੇਲਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis no naam daan kare so paae gurasabadee melaaeidaa |2|
lines.english: Whoever the Lord blesses with His gift, obtains it. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He unites him with Himself. ||2||
The fourteen worlds are Your markets.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵੈ ਕਾ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਕੋ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naavai kaa vaapaaree hovai gurasabadee ko paaeidaa |3|
lines.english: One who deals in the Name, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, obtains it. ||3||
The True Guru reveals them, along with one's inner being.
